creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

The following patch produces the expected order in
/usr/local/lib/vlc/demux/liblive555_plugin.la:

--- patch-configure begins here ---
--- configure.orig	2009-10-29 20:05:51.000000000 +0100
+++ configure	2009-11-03 22:49:08.000000000 +0100
@@ -27957,8 +27957,8 @@
 
 done
 
-     other_libs="-lgroupsock -lBasicUsageEnvironment -lUsageEnvironment"
-     other_libs_pic="-lgroupsock_pic -lBasicUsageEnvironment_pic -lUsageEnvironment_pic"
+     other_libs="-lgroupsock -lUsageEnvironment -lBasicUsageEnvironment"
+     other_libs_pic="-lgroupsock_pic -lUsageEnvironment_pic -lBasicUsageEnvironment_pic"
       if test "${SYS}" = "mingw32"; then
         # add ws2_32 for closesocket, select, recv
         other_libs="$other_libs -lws2_32"
@@ -28173,13 +28173,13 @@
 
 
   for element in live555; do
-    eval "LIBS_${element}="'"'"-L${real_live555_tree}/groupsock -lgroupsock "'$'"{LIBS_${element}} "'"'
+    eval "LIBS_${element}="'"'"-L${real_live555_tree}/UsageEnvironment -lUsageEnvironment "'$'"{LIBS_${element}} "'"'
     am_modules_with_libs="${am_modules_with_libs} ${element}"
   done
 
 
   for element in live555; do
-    eval "LIBS_${element}="'"'"-L${real_live555_tree}/UsageEnvironment -lUsageEnvironment "'$'"{LIBS_${element}} "'"'
+    eval "LIBS_${element}="'"'"-L${real_live555_tree}/groupsock -lgroupsock "'$'"{LIBS_${element}} "'"'
     am_modules_with_libs="${am_modules_with_libs} ${element}"
   done
 
--- patch-configure ends here ---

and now it contains:

# Libraries that this one depends upon.
dependency_libs=' -L/usr/ports/multimedia/vlc/work/fake//usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/live/groupsock -lgroupsock -L/usr/local/live/UsageEnvironment -lUsageEnvironment -L/usr/local/live/BasicUsageEnvironment -lBasicUsageEnvironment -L/usr/local/live/liveMedia -lliveMedia /usr/local/lib/libvlccore.la /usr/local/lib/libhal.la /usr/local/lib/libdbus-1.la -pthread -lrt /usr/local/lib/libintl.la /usr/local/lib/libiconv.la'

but vlc (tested with "1.0.3 Goldeneye") is still unable to open a rtsp
stream if linked against a static liveMedia.

Same error messages:

[0x34136100] main libvlc warning: cannot load module `/usr/local/lib/vlc/demux/liblive555_plugin.so' (/usr/local/lib/vlc/demux/liblive555_plugin.so: Undefined symbol "_ZTI9HashTable")

[0x3741cec0] access_realrtsp access warning: only real/helix rtsp servers supported for now
[0x3741cec0] main access warning: no access module matching "rtsp" could be loaded

[0x3427bfd0] main input error: open of `rtsp://mafreebox.freebox.fr/fbxtv_pub/stream?namespace=1&service=816&flavour=sd' failed: (null)

I understand that you don't want to install liveMedia shared libraies,
but untill now, I have not been able to open RTSP streams with VLC
without them.

Best regards,
-- 
Th. Thomas.
